---
name: 'Submit a Method'
about: 'Contribute a method and your experience'
title: 'New Method: '
labels: 'new-method'
---

### Method Name
*(If it’s your own method, give it a name)*


### Method URL
*(When there is no good website, write an article about the method)*


### Purpose
*(What is the method for?)*


### Process (High-level)
*(The big picture / high-level process)*


### Experience
*(How do you like the method? What went well, what broke?)*


### Author
*(Your Name)*


---

## Optional Details

### Industry
*(e.g. "Finance", "Healthcare")*


### Organization Size
*(<10, <50, <200, <1000, <5000, >5000)*


### Teams Applied To
*(e.g. "3")*


### People Per Team
*(e.g. "5")*


### Roles
*(e.g. "Devs, PMs")*


### Leadership or Hierarchy Levels Involved
*(e.g. "2")*


### Frequency
*(e.g. "Daily")*


### Time Period
*(e.g. "6 months")*


### Layers between you and the Customer
*(e.g. "2")*


### When it breaks
*(Limitations of the method)*


### Tips
*(Tips and tricks for success)*
